title: NIELIT Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 02 Resource Person, Junior Resource Person Posts
description: The National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology (NIELIT) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Resource Persons and Junior Resource Person Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Electrical, Computer Science Engineering, MCA, and any degree can apply for the NIELIT Notification 2026. The interested applicants...
